title: Magic Mirror
description: A magic mirror which lets you TP home
body:
A magic mirror which lets you TP home when used (a spawn must be set). 

It inflicts configurable debuffs, damage and XP level cost when used.

⠀

![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/ZzOIHFj.png)


⠀

Also has a config option for spawning in chest loot.
